## LibraryData.SubLibraryMergeSource type

Specifies a sub-library to merge into a new library.

Can be either: - A library instance directly (merges all collections) - An `IMergeLibrarySource` object with optional filtering

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type SubLibraryMergeSource<TLibrary> = TLibrary | IMergeLibrarySource<TLibrary, SourceId>;
```
**References:** [IMergeLibrarySource](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.imergelibrarysource.md)<!-- -->, [SourceId](./ts-chocolate.sourceid.md)
